name: Retractable Cable Car Charger - dealworthy™ Black
description:
The Retractable Cable Car Charger from dealworthy™ Black is a compact and efficient solution for charging devices on the go. It features a retractable design, making it easy to store and manage cords without tangling. The charger connects via an AC power adapter, ensuring compatibility with most vehicle power outlets. It seamlessly blends with most car interiors, while its lightweight design ensures portability.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.
